caption: Figure 9.4.1: Challenges in importing amongst tourism MSMEs who import – all survey phases (%)
description: A stacked bar chart showing the percentage of tourism MSMEs facing big, small, or no challenges in importing across three survey phases: July 2020, October 2020, and January 2021. 'Big Challenge' is represented in blue, 'Small Challenge' in orange, and 'No Challenge' in grey.
